events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a missed weld per drawing (DOC) in production welding, at rough-complete stage. This is non-compliant because the drawing requires a weld that was not performed. Decision should be fail. Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective. Risk: medium/high. Let's say high because missed weld can affect structural integrity. Percent complete maybe 85. Confidence high.
